name: ExtraStimulantsPlus Features
description: Built-in ExtraStimulantsPlus gameplay, editor, and utility features.

enabled.label: Path Tracing (Beta)
enabled.description: Screen-space path tracer compositor effect. Forward+ only; off by default. Visible cost varies with samples and half-res.

samples.label: Samples per pixel
samples.description: Hemisphere rays per pixel per frame. Higher = cleaner but slower; 8 is heavy.

max_steps.label: Max ray steps
max_steps.description: Screen-space raymarch step count per ray.

thickness.label: Hit thickness
thickness.description: Depth epsilon (world units) for accepting a screen-space hit.

fade.label: Indirect intensity
fade.description: Blend weight of the indirect light onto the base color (0 = none, 1 = full).

half_res.label: Half resolution
half_res.description: Dispatch at half-resolution. Recommended on; turn off only with strong GPU.
